long_context.label: 64K
long_context.error: OOM guard fired at free<8GB; killed server cleanly

notes: Post patches 013/014/015 with turboquant KV. Coder-30B is MoE (A3B) — NOT a DeltaNet hybrid — so patch 013 shouldn't materially affect quality, but throughput is measurably lower than the 2026-04-14 fp8 baseline (68.4 @ 128 vs new 44.4 @ 256; 6.3 @ 64K vs 0.6 @ 32K). Delta is the cost of: (1) turboquant KV (extra dequant per attention vs fp8), (2) chunked_prefill_size=2048 vs old default 8192 (more overhead per token), (3) mlx_vlm + torchcodec process bloat from patches 007-012. OOM guard fired at 64K with MEM_FRAC=0.55 — this config maxes at 32K on M4 64GB.
